title: Sr. Actuary Business Analyst
description: DescriptionJob Title Sr. Actuary Business Analyst (Insurance)Experience 68 yearsLocation / Work Model RemoteRole OverviewWe are seeking an experienced Actuary Business Analyst with strong insurance and actuarial domain expertise to work closely with business stakeholders, actuarial teams, and technology delivery teams.
